scripts.check: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const html = fs.readFileSync('index.html', 'utf8'); let ok = true; if (!html.includes('<!DOCTYPE html>')) { console.error('Missing DOCTYPE'); ok = false; } if (!html.includes('<canvas')) { console.error('Missing canvas element'); ok = false; } if (!html.includes('getContext')) { console.error('Missing WebGL context creation'); ok = false; } if (!html.includes('requestAnimationFrame')) { console.error('Missing animation loop'); ok = false; } if (!html.includes('smoothstep')) { console.error('Missing smoothstep in shader'); ok = false; } if (!html.includes('u_blobs')) { console.error('Missing blob uniforms'); ok = false; } if (ok) { console.log('All checks passed'); } else { process.exit(1); }"
